zh.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克
zh.Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Alpin of Lochabar於大約1068年出生時，她的父親Walter Alpin de Lochaber29歲，母親Emma FitzAlan19歲。她於大約1095年與Simon de Fraser在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1140年在蘇格蘭享年73歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克
zh-hans.Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Alpin of Lochabar于大约1068年出生时，她的父亲Walter Alpin de Lochaber29岁，母亲Emma FitzAlan19岁。她于大约1095年与Simon de Fraser在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1140年在苏格兰享年73岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Alpin
meanings: The highest land on the peak of a mountain.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Alpin of Lochabar was born about 1068, her father, Walter Alpin de Lochaber, was 29 and her mother, Emma FitzAlan, was 19. She married Simon de Fraser about 1095, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1140, in Scotland, at the age of 73, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland: Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Alpin of Lochabar est née environ 1068, son père, Walter Alpin de Lochaber, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Emma FitzAlan, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Simon de Fraser environ 1095, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1140, à Écosse, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Alpin of Lochabar um 1068 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Alpin de Lochaber 29 und ihre Mutter Emma FitzAlan 19. Sie hat um 1095 in Scotland Simon de Fraser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1140 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Alpin of Lochabar è nata il circa 1068, sua padre, Walter Alpin de Lochaber, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Emma FitzAlan, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Simon de Fraser circa 1095, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1140, nel Scotland, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Alpin of Lochabarが約1068年に生まれた時，父Walter Alpin de Lochaberは29歳，母Emma FitzAlanは19歳であった。約1095年にスコットランドでSimon de Fraserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1140年にスコットランドで73歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Alpin of Lochabar(이)가 대략 1068년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Alpin de Lochaber(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma FitzAlan(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1095년 스컷랜드에서 Simon de Fraser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1140년 스컷랜드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: Alnwick, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland: Peebles, Tueddal, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Alpin of Lochabar nasceu aproximadamente 1068, seu pai, Walter Alpin de Lochaber, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Emma FitzAlan, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon de Fraser aproximadamente 1095, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1140, em Scotland, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Alpin of Lochabar родилась около 1068 г., её отцу по имени Walter Alpin de Lochaber было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma FitzAlan, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon de Fraser около 1095 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1140 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Alpin of Lochabar nació aproximadamente 1068, su papá, Walter Alpin de Lochaber, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Emma FitzAlan, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Simon de Fraser aproximadamente 1095, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1140, en Scotland, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
